author: Author
comments_empty_text: No comment matches the current view. Reset the filter or review published content.
comments_help_intro: Filter by status, open the full message to read its context, then approve, reject, or delete it as needed.
comments_help_step_filter: Start by filtering pending comments to prioritize moderation.
comments_help_step_moderate: Then approve, reject, or delete the comment according to your editorial rules.
comments_help_step_read: Open a comment to review the full content, the author, and the related page.
comments_tour_actions_content: Approve, reject, or delete a comment directly from its row.
comments_tour_empty_content: There are no comments waiting for moderation right now. Come back here as soon as the site starts receiving feedback to approve, reject, or clean up incoming messages.
comments_tour_filter_content: Show only pending, approved, or rejected comments so moderation moves faster.
comments_tour_table_content: Each row shows the author, a message excerpt, its status, and the date. The comment text opens the full reading view.
invalid_content_length: Comment must be between 5 and 5000 characters.
